diagrams.title: Python Operator Precedence Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows the hierarchy of operators from highest to lowest precedence
diagrams.purpose: Remember the order of operations when evaluating expressions

diagrams.title: Variable as Reference Diagram
diagrams.description: Visualizes how Python variables act as references/labels to objects in memory
elements: Variable x points to object 10 in memory
Variable y = x makes y point to same object
Modifying y through methods affects the shared object
Use .copy() or slicing [:] for independent copy
diagrams.purpose: Understand reference semantics and avoid unintended mutations

diagrams.title: Falsy Values in Python
diagrams.description: Complete list of values that evaluate to False in boolean context
diagrams.purpose: Remember which values are falsy for conditional statements
